payload.answer: I can help rewrite the memory, but the replacement text is ambiguous: “He prefers the other one” does not identify who “he” is or what “the other one” refers to.
repair_options: Ask the user to specify who “he” refers to and what “the other one” is before rewriting.
Offer to rewrite the target memory once the user provides the exact replacement text.
Offer to keep the existing memory unchanged until the ambiguous references are clarified.
